description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden cargo bed with open slatted sides and a flat base, designed for carrying goods. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side near the rear, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, two long, straight wooden handles extend outward, allowing a person to push or pull the cart. The side panels are slightly raised, forming shallow barriers to help contain items during transport. The construction appears robust, with visible wooden planks and structural beams reinforcing the frame. The overall finish is matte, with natural wood tones dominating the appearance.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, open slatted sides, and long front handles for manual transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cargo bed, raised side panels, and the two long handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, slatted wooden sides, and the full length of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cargo bed, the wheel structure, and the side rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the second wheel visible, showing the symmetry and construction of the cart.
